text.message: Black I'll do wheat sheep for 2 wood
I think he has to build to 10
he has a good chance because I just steal from you blue
got to love players who steal from a guy with three points
You had 3 downed devs and army pacing and he had 5 at the time.  It was reasonable
More reasonable than not blocking the leader?
Just stop.  You're whining and throwing atm
you stole from me on 3 ponts
Bro.  Stop.  After the game rewind to that point in time and take a look
Sure.  And maybe next time be less emotional about the game.  Even if there is a mistake there is no reason to throw
You're certainly out of it now
But you didn't have to be
We spent the past 5 min typing instead of playing
He doesn't have to now.  You stopped popping in favor of typing and blocking me
I said already am coming for wood
You need to brush that stuff off. The game was still playable
You had army pacing. All you had to do was pop
all he had to do was roll 8 5 4 9 10
Ok I'm done talking.  We're clearly not in a solution oriented mindset
all the way to the point where he builds to 10
Only if you promise to as well.  Hint, you wont
you told me he was building to 10
Told you :). Not solution oriented. Just in complaining mindset
You had a knight on him and 4 devs.  I can't anticipate you not playing the game after
